attachments.fallback: How Do I Export DBX Emails into Outlook PST Format Easily? - @rickjames
attachments.text:
<https://forums.fusetools.com/c/how-to-discussions/5|How-to Discussions>

If you want to move your DBX emails into Outlook PST quickly, the Shoviv <https://www.shoviv.com/dbx-to-pst-converter.html|DBX to PST Converter> makes it super easy. This tool lets you convert multiple DBX files at once, without worrying about size limits. All your emails, folders, and metadata stay exactly as they were, so nothing gets lost or messy. You can even export directly to Office 365 or Live Exchange, or save emails i…
